title: GL2 5LF, Severn Trent Water Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/HP3095CT/V008
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Severn Trent Water Limited   Installation name: Netheridge Sewage Treatment Plant   Permit number: EPR/HP3095CT   "
